user.title: Sign in to Jackery
user.description: Your credentials are used only to retrieve the Bluetooth key and are not stored. Email accounts require the two-letter region selected in the Jackery app.

data.region: Account region e.g. DE or US (email only)

system.title: Choose a Jackery device
system.description: Select the system to control locally.

bluetooth.title: Choose the matching Bluetooth device
bluetooth.description:
Only Jackery advertisements matching serial **{serial}** are selectable.

Other Jackery devices found:
{other_jackery}

Other BLE devices found: {other_ble_count}. They are hidden because they cannot be selected safely.

bluetooth_empty.title: No matching Bluetooth device found
bluetooth_empty.description:
No visible Bluetooth advertisement matches serial **{serial}** yet.

Other Jackery devices found:
{other_jackery}

Other BLE devices found: {other_ble_count}.

validate.title: Validate Bluetooth connection

confirm.title: Device ready
confirm.description: ✅ **{name} connected successfully and returned its status.**

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Jackery service.
error.invalid_region: Enter a two-letter region code, for example DE or US.
error.key_failed: Could not obtain a valid Bluetooth key for this device.

abort.already_configured: This Jackery device is already configured.
abort.no_devices: No Jackery systems were found on this account.
abort.no_bluetooth_adapter: Home Assistant has no connectable Bluetooth adapter or proxy.
abort.device_unavailable: The selected Bluetooth device is no longer available.
